description_long: This is a robust sledgehammer featuring a thick, rectangular black metal head with chamfered edges and a central wooden handle. The head is solid and symmetrical, with flat striking faces on both ends, designed for delivering powerful blows. The handle is made of natural wood, slightly textured, and appears cylindrical with a gentle taper for grip comfort. The junction between the head and handle is tightly fitted, with the wood visible through the center of the head. The metal head has a matte finish with subtle highlights, while the wooden handle shows a natural grain pattern. The overall construction suggests durability and suitability for heavy-duty tasks in urban environments such as demolition or construction.
description: A heavy-duty sledgehammer with a black rectangular metal head and a cylindrical wooden handle, designed for powerful impact tasks. The head is solid and flat-faced, while the handle is natural wood with visible grain.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat striking face of the black metal head and the circular end of the wooden handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the wooden handle and the rectangular profile of the metal head.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the opposite striking face of the head and the end of the handle, emphasizing the handle's taper.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the handle's length and the head's rectangular shape from the other side.
attribute_handle_type: wooden straight handle, cylindrical with a slight taper, natural grain texture, no visible grip enhancements
attribute_head_type: sledgehammer head, rectangular solid steel with flat striking faces on both ends, chamfered edges
